title: rubus cordigerus
intro: Rubus cordigerus, also known as the raspberry rose or wild raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family. Traditionally, Rubus cordigerus has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus cordigerus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Rubus cordigerus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall health and well-being.
